# CWE-281 — Improper Preservation of Permissions (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-281-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Safe: copies content then reapplies source permission bits.
func BackupConfig(c *gin.Context) {
	src := "/etc/app/config.toml"
	dst := "/backups/config.toml"
	info, err := os.Stat(src)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "stat"})
		return
	}
	in, _ := os.Open(src)
	out, _ := os.OpenFile(dst, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY|os.O_TRUNC, info.Mode())
	_, _ = io.Copy(out, in)
	in.Close()
	out.Close()
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"backup": dst})
}
